## Summary
Executive leadership squad covering all C-level functions. CEO vision/strategy/fundraising, COO operations/OKRs/scaling, CMO brand/GTM/demand-gen, CTO tech-stack/architecture/debt, CIO security/compliance/infrastructure, CAIO AI strategy/responsible-AI/LLM patterns. Includes Porter's 5 Forces, Blue Ocean, BCG Matrix, OKR, TOGAF, and 39 total frameworks.

## Key Frameworks
- Vision-Mission-Strategy Cascade (CEO)
- 3 Horizons Strategic Planning (CEO)
- OKR Framework (COO)
- Brand Positioning STP + Go-to-Market 4 phases (CMO)
- Technology Radar + Build-Buy-Partner (CTO)
- Security 6 layers + Compliance Matrix (CIO)
- AI Maturity Model 5 levels + Responsible AI 5 pillars (CAIO)
